from target import run_length_decode

def test_run_length_decode():
    # Simple mixed counts and default single characters
    assert run_length_decode("3a2bC") == "aaabbC"
    # Edge case: empty string should return empty string
    assert run_length_decode("") == ""
    # Zero count should raise ValueError
    import pytest
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        run_length_decode("0x")
    # Trailing count without character should raise ValueError
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        run_length_decode("5")
    # Single characters without explicit count
    assert run_length_decode("abc") == "abc"
    # Large count
    assert run_length_decode("10z") == "z" * 10

from target import run_length_decode

def test_run_length_decode():
    # Simple mixed counts and default single characters
    assert run_length_decode("3a2bC") == "aaabbC"
    # Edge case: empty string should return empty string
    assert run_length_decode("") == ""
    # Edge case: zero count should raise ValueError
    import pytest
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        run_length_decode("0x")
    # Edge case: trailing count without character should raise ValueError
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        run_length_decode("5")
    # Single characters without explicit count
    assert run_length_decode("abc") == "abc"
    # Large count
    assert run_length_decode("10z") == "z" * 10
